gates.action: Scoped Paperclip write contract implemented for comment/disposition capabilities with denied secret and cross-project mutation actions.
gates.evidence_required: make autonomy-controls writes autonomy_controls_v1_8 report and audit ledger.

gates.action: Typed capability broker MVP implemented for safe reads, issue comments, PR creation, verification, and alerting.
gates.evidence_required: Capability config forbids arbitrary shell, raw Docker, raw filesystem writes, raw GitHub token use, secret reads, and Ruflo runtime execution.

gates.action: Risk classifier and policy decisions implemented in autonomy_controls_v1_8.
gates.evidence_required: Policy tests prove destructive and secret-bearing actions require human approval.

gates.action: Secret-free autonomy action ledger implemented for dry-run actions.
gates.evidence_required: One dry-run action writes a complete ledger record outside the transient container.

gates.action: Active alerting dry-run contract implemented for stack health, rollback, stale issue, loop budget, and provider spend events.
gates.evidence_required: Scheduled monitor run and test alert proof exist without printing webhook secrets.

gates.action: Canary and rollback dry-run promotion contract implemented.
gates.evidence_required: One non-destructive canary or dry-run promotion completes with rollback proof.

gates.action: Kill-switch contract implemented with disable marker and core-service verification requirement.
gates.evidence_required: Operator can disable autonomy and stack-health still reports core services.

gates.action: Keep Ruflo planning/packet only until all non-Ruflo autonomy controls pass.
gates.evidence_required: ruflo_status reports production_enabled=false and disallowed runtime services.

gates.action: Keep v1.7 backup, restore, monitoring, security, and rollback artifacts current.
gates.evidence_required: v1.7B, v1.7C, v1.7D, and v1.7F evidence exists and remains reproducible.
